name: @somnosalud/webapp-conversor-psg
description: Frontend Vite + React + pdf.js + JSZip — utility client-side para parsear PDFs polisomnograficos. Engine Hipoxico 0-100 (Azarbarzin 2019). Legacy v0 monolitico vive en legacy-v0/index.html (1887 lineas). Refactor a TS modular pendiente Fase 2 segun docs/vault/MASTER-PLAN.md

scripts.build: echo 'skeleton — refactor desde legacy-v0/index.html a Vite+React modular pendiente Fase 2' && exit 0
scripts.dev: echo 'skeleton — usar legacy-v0 mientras tanto: cd legacy-v0 && python3 -m http.server 8765' && exit 0
scripts.test: echo 'skeleton — tests con fixtures PSGs reales pendientes Fase 2' && exit 0

author: SomnoSalud Team
